title: Westchester County Spring Open House Tour
address: Starting at 45 Maple Ave, White Plains, NY
excerpt: Tour five curated listings in one day with our team and lending partners.
location: Multiple Homes Across White Plains and Warwick
description: Join our spring open house tour featuring five move-in-ready listings across top school districts in Westchester County. We will provide market insight, neighborhood overviews, and on-site mortgage Q&A.
